title: Sleep After 40: Complete Resource for Women
tags: sleep after 40, menopause sleep, sleep supplements women, insomnia after 40
author: Happy Aging Team
summary_html: Sleep quality declines after 40 due to hormonal shifts in progesterone, cortisol, and melatonin. This hub covers why it happens and the best-evidenced supplements — magnesium glycinate and glycine — for restoring deep, restorative sleep.
seo_title: Sleep After 40 for Women: Complete Guide to Better Sleep (2026)
seo_description: Why does sleep get harder after 40? This complete guide explains the hormonal causes and covers the best supplements — magnesium glycinate and glycine — for women in perimenopause.
